name: Supplemental data provenance
what_it_solves: Structured record of data lineage for every supplemental table/figure in the MBD4/ATR bundle.
how_it_solves: SUPPLEMENTAL_DATA_PROVENANCE_v2.md and v3.md list source dataset → filter → derived file for each artefact.
why_it_exists: Publication-grade requirement: reviewer must be able to reconstruct every value from a public dataset ID.
